quote: Do not save what is left after spending, but spend what is left after saving.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: A budget is telling your money where to go instead of wondering where it went.
author: Dave Ramsey

quote: Financial freedom is available to those who learn about it and work for it.
author: Robert Kiyosaki

quote: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Money is a terrible master but an excellent servant.
author: P.T. Barnum

quote: Beware of little expenses; a small leak will sink a great ship.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Wealth is the ability to fully experience life.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: A part of all you earn is yours to keep.
author: George S. Clason

quote: Never spend your money before you have earned it.
author: Thomas Jefferson

quote: Money is only a tool. It will take you wherever you wish, but it will not replace you as the driver.
author: Ayn Rand

quote: Doing well with money has a little to do with how smart you are and a lot to do with how you behave.
author: Morgan Housel

quote: Formal education will make you a living; self-education will make you a fortune.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: It’s not how much money you make, but how much money you keep, and how hard it works for you.
author: Robert Kiyosaki

quote: Budgeting is the only way to gain control over your financial destiny.
author: John C. Maxwell

quote: It is not the man who has too little, but the man who craves more, who is poor.
author: Seneca

quote: The goal isn't more money. The goal is living life on your terms.
author: Will Rogers

quote: Wealth consists not in having great possessions, but in having few wants.
author: Epictetus

quote: Too many people spend money they haven't earned, to buy things they don't want, to impress people they don't like.
author: Will Rogers

quote: A budget doesn't limit your freedom; it gives you freedom.
author: Rachel Cruze

quote: The budget is not just a collection of numbers, but an expression of our values and aspirations.
author: Jack Lew

quote: Annual income twenty pounds, annual expenditure nineteen nineteen and six, result happiness. Annual income twenty pounds, annual expenditure twenty pounds ought and six, result misery.
author: Charles Dickens

quote: Save money and money will save you.
author: Jamaican Proverb

quote: He who buys what he does not need, steals from himself.
author: Swedish Proverb

quote: The art is not in making money, but in keeping it.
author: Proverb

quote: Rather go to bed supperless than rise in debt.
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: Debt is like any other trap, easy enough to get into, but hard enough to get out of.
author: Henry Wheeler Shaw

quote: Before you borrow money from a friend, decide which you need most.
author: American Proverb

quote: He who decides to provide himself with a debt, provides himself with a master.
author: German Proverb

quote: Every time you borrow money, you're robbing your future self.
author: Nathan W. Morris

quote: The individual investor should act consistently as an investor and not as a speculator.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: In investing, what is comfortable is rarely profitable.
author: Robert Arnott

quote: Wide diversification is only required when investors do not understand what they are doing.
author: Warren Buffett

quote: The four most dangerous words in investing are: 'this time it's different'.
author: Sir John Templeton

quote: In the short run, the market is a voting machine but in the long run, it is a weighing machine.
author: Benjamin Graham

quote: If you don't believe it or don't get it, I don't have the time to try to convince you, sorry.
author: Satoshi Nakamoto

quote: Bitcoin is a technological tour de force.
author: Bill Gates

quote: Cryptocurrency is such a powerful concept that it can almost overturn governments.
author: Charles Hoskinson

quote: Crypto is not just money. It is a new way of expressing trust and building systems.
author: Unknown

quote: Bitcoin is the beginning of something great: a currency without a government, something necessary and imperative.
author: Nassim Nicholas Taleb

quote: Setting goals is the first step in turning the invisible into the visible.
author: Tony Robbins

quote: Without a goal, you can't score.
author: Casey Stengel

quote: A goal is a dream with a deadline.
author: Napoleon Hill

quote: You must have long term goals to keep you from being frustrated by short term failures.
author: Charles C. Noble
